{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323170720D3DAB881A827CB461D28"}"},"total":7},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7608479555565634328","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好书，作者大大不要段跟啊"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771490293,"group_id":"7594152965145889816","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N43kqa8lpywBDogrNw2F/BCDBFo52kcIiT/s+GniVrXl","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"3769544530999630","user_name":"用户名53991113"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3769544530999630","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7594152965145889816","book_info":{"abstract":"苏子安穿越西游世界，竟重生为方寸山藏经阁的一卷普通经书！
借悟空修炼反哺，苏子安一路突破：下品法器→上品法器→宝器→先天灵宝！书内乾坤开辟，化身显形，更能孕育先天大道！
他再传《遮天法》，助悟空铸就红尘仙体；授《神话大罗秘要》，引悟空开辟大千世界！
当孙悟空吞纳九九大罗天劫，肉身硬撼雷部众神时，菩提老祖懵了：“这真是我收的那只灵明石猴？”
佛门慌了：“说好的桀骜妖猴，怎么成了镇压三界的神话大罗？”
截教狂喜：“六耳猕猴？别管了，抱孙悟空大腿！”
地府勾魂？拘魂锁链拉不动，六道轮回镇不住，悟空反手打穿幽冥！
天庭招安？抱歉，我麾下妖族大圣皆为红尘仙，何须你那芝麻小官！
苏子安立于书内乾坤，俯瞰三界：“悟空，西行？不必了，随我横扫洪荒，执掌诸天！”
从此，西游变洪荒，神象镇狱，遮天蔽日，一尊经书天帝，携万妖帝尊，重塑三界秩序！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/09a0f34ed73beb9d755e4b8567300571~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"素笔诚","author_id":"","book_id":"7594152965145889816","book_name":"西游：红尘仙基初铸就","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#401808","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7646人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":373,"name":"西游衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=373&name=西游衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7594164434893816344","read_count":"7646","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"690486"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"178","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,穿越,诸天万界,西游衍生,东方玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/09a0f34ed73beb9d755e4b8567300571~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779440841&x-signature=yuApSWqlLwjCZ5H%2FDp2%2B6zHoonI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4197266439034348","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"19"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323170720D3DAB881A827CB461D28"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"sta
